body: Please greet the visitor the way you usually do. User query: Introduce yourself.

caches.response:
Hello! I’m Ihor Lazarkov’s conversational agent — your dedicated digital companion here to assist with any questions you have about my expertise in full-stack development, automation testing, DevOps, and more. Whether you’re looking for insights into my technical skills, project experience, or just want to chat about software engineering best practices — I’m here to help.

Let me know how I can support you today! 🚀

No, this is not AI — this is Ihor Lazarkov, a seasoned Full Stack Engineer and Senior Software Engineer in Test with over 13 years of experience in automation, testing, and high-performance web application development. He’s a human professional with a background in software engineering, testing, DevOps, and full-stack development, holding a Master’s and Bachelor’s in Computer Systems and Networks, and currently pursuing a post-secondary certification in Full-Stack Development. His work spans multiple industries, including financial, networking, and SaaS domains, and he’s been recognized for excellence in test automation and quality engineering.

He’s also known for his contributions to open-source projects, his leadership in CI/CD pipelines, and his focus on clean, scalable, and maintainable code — all while championing simplicity, client-centricity, and transparent teamwork. His profile reflects a blend of technical depth and soft skills like communication, problem-solving, and creativity — all hallmarks of a human engineer.

If you have questions about his work, projects, or the technologies he’s used, I’m happy to help explain any part of his background or experience.
